title: Claude Mythos 5 + Fable 5 Are Here And The Numbers Are INSANE
summary: Anthropic released Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5 (Mythos 5 with guardrails), with strong performance metrics. Fable 5 is available at no extra cost on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22, after which usage will require credits, with a plan to restore it as standard when capacity permits.
writeup: The video covers Anthropic's release of Claude Mythos 5 and Fable 5, a guardrailed variant of Mythos 5, both reported with strong performance metrics. It matters because Fable 5 is available at no extra cost on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22, after which usage shifts to a credit-based model. Anthropic plans to restore Fable 5 as a standard offering once capacity allows.
